case_title: CHRISTINA BRANDT BERNSTEIN VS. EQUIFAX CREIDT INFORMATION SERVICES, INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERNSTEIN, CHRISTINA BRANDT AS TO DEFENDANT EQUIFAX CREDIT INFORMATION SERVICES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-03-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-03-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL. PLAINTIFF CHRISTINA BERNSTEIN IS PRESENT.
